sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for NES port

special_mechanics.name: Elevator System
special_mechanics.description: Player can enter elevators and use up/down inputs to ascend or descend between floors. Elevators respond to player joystick movements. Player can ride on elevator roof but cannot control its motion or cross to other side

physics_values.elevator_response_speed: responsive when not in alarm state

special_mechanics.name: Jump-Kick
special_mechanics.description: Player (Otto) can perform a close-range jump-kick to defeat enemy agents

special_mechanics.name: Shaft Traversal
special_mechanics.description: Player can jump across empty elevator shafts as long as the elevator is above him

tier_notes: Tier 2: Empirical/qualitative data only. Wikipedia source contains gameplay mechanics but no precise physics parameters (velocities, accelerations, gravity values). All numeric physics values unknown.
